Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify issues: after approval, PO creation must happen before receiving goods, invoice receipt after goods, matching after invoice and PO, pay after match, close after pay.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: No parallelism. So whole sequence is linear.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But requirement just enforce order. So root sequence of all eight activities.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Explain how ensures conformance. Provide corrected code. Will output in final.
